benefits.description: feels like shot of cocaine to system, energizing effect

side_effects.description: NAD+ subq injection is spicy and burns if not reconstituted with special BAC water or lidocaine

protocol_notes: Administers NAD+ subq in glute. Notes pH sensitivity: NAD+ pH ~3, BAC water ~6.0, reconstituted NAD+ water ~8.5. IM administration may avoid injection site burn. Recommends NAD+ especially for older individuals as levels diminish with age.
